problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
